releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🎉 This is a stable release

**Version:** 2.1.0


## What's Changed
* fix: 修正预检查工作流中的构建产物路径 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/Raven-Pensieve/obsidian-next-toc/pull/169
* chore: downgrade React to 18.3.1 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/Raven-Pensieve/obsidian-next-toc/pull/172
* fix: “单一标题时显示目录”设置关闭时正确隐藏指示器 by @linglilongyi in https://github.com/Raven-Pensieve/obsidian-next-toc/pull/176
* feat: 支持在所有可见视图中渲染内联目录 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/Raven-Pensieve/obsidian-next-toc/pull/178
* feat-138 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/Raven-Pensieve/obsidian-next-toc/pull/179
* fix-149_153_161_175 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/Raven-Pensieve/obsidian-next-toc/pull/180
* feat-155 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/Raven-Pensieve/obsidian-next-toc/pull/181
* feat-173 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/Raven-Pensieve/obsidian-next-toc/pull/182
* feat-174 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/Raven-Pensieve/obsidian-next-toc/pull/183
* release-2.1.0 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/Raven-Pensieve/obsidian-next-toc/pull/184

## New Contributors
* @linglilongyi made their first contribution in https://github.com/Raven-Pensieve/obsidian-next-toc/pull/176

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Raven-Pensieve/obsidian-next-toc/compare/2.0.1...2.1.0

🎉 This is a stable release

**Version:** 1.1.2


## What's Changed
* fix: 修复重复的markdown渲染 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-next-toc/pull/29
* feat: ui样式优化 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-next-toc/pull/30
* fix: 修正目录组件的选择器以匹配容器类名 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-next-toc/pull/31
* fix: 调整返回按钮图标尺寸与对齐 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-next-toc/pull/32
* ci: 在 PR 合并后自动清理构建产物并更新权限 by @RavenHogWarts in https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-next-toc/pull/33


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/RavenHogWarts/obsidian-next-toc/compare/1.1.1...1.1.2
